text:
いつも悪いわね。
でも、あなたならきっと
引き受けてくれると思ったわ。

どんなにおいしいごちそうを作っても
いつかは飽きられてしまう。
料理って虚しい一面もあるのよね。

でも私には、あなたのような
素敵な協力者がいるから
決して探求心が潰えないわ！

アクルプスの背びれ
楽しみに待ってるわ

Sorry for all the trouble, but I was just sure
you would be able to help.

One harsh truth about the world of food
is that no matter how fantastic a dish you
put together, eat it too many times and it
loses its appeal.

But since I'm fortunate enough to have a lovely
helper like yourself, I don't have to worry
about running out of ways to spice things up!

I can't wait to get my hands on one of those
Aqualupus dorsal fins!
